change_details: Shorten lr_warmup_steps 100 → 50 under the new entropy=0.008 baseline. Three replicates at current-best show consistent no-collapse (0/3) but inconsistent learning (1/3 full, 1/3 partial, 1/3 uniform). Faster LR ramp lets the trainer reach peak learning signal earlier, possibly escaping the 'uniform' attractor before entropy+policy equilibrium locks in. Under the OLD base, 75 regressed — but that was seed-variance under a collapse-prone regime. At 0.008 with no collapse risk, shorter warmup is worth re-testing.
